name: ruby_implicit

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.1 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] With no ｜ marker the base is the maximal preceding run of the same character class (青梅); html is <ruby>. Offsets from the §3 byte model. Serialize canonicalises right-side ruby to the BARE form (the explicit ｜ is dropped) per ADR 0003 §6.1 / ADR 0002: ｜ is emitted only when a bare 《reading》 would re-parse to a different base; here every base is an all-kanji run whose preceding char is non-base (line start / 　 / の), so the bare form re-parses identically.

source: 青梅《おうめ》という地名。

expected.serialize: 青梅《おうめ》という地名。
